translation.en: I always make an effort in my work.

notes_md:
**nỗ lực** = effort; trying hard to do something. It can be both a noun and a verb.

As a **verb**, use **nỗ lực + verb** to say someone makes an effort to do something.  

As a **noun**, you’ll often see **sự nỗ lực** (more formal) or **những nỗ lực** (plural efforts).

Close synonym: **cố gắng** (very common, slightly more everyday).
exampleSentencesTranslated: I have to make a lot of effort to pass this exam.
I believe that effort will help me achieve my goal.
She always puts effort into her work to get promoted.
notes:
nỗ lực = effort; trying hard to do something. It can be both a noun and a verb.

As a verb, use nỗ lực + verb to say someone makes an effort to do something.  

As a noun, you’ll often see sự nỗ lực (more formal) or những nỗ lực (plural efforts).

Close synonym: cố gắng (very common, slightly more everyday).

definitions.es: El acto de esforzarse mucho para hacer algo.
definitions.en: The act of trying hard to do something.
definitions.vi: Hành động cố gắng hết sức để làm điều gì đó.

example.en: I will make every effort to achieve my goals.
example.vi: Tôi sẽ nỗ lực hết mình để đạt được mục tiêu.
example.es: Haré todo lo posible para alcanzar mis metas.

translation.en: I always make an effort in my work.

exampleSentences: Em phải nỗ lực rất nhiều để vượt qua kỳ thi này.
Anh tin rằng nỗ lực sẽ giúp mình đạt được mục tiêu.
Chị ấy luôn nỗ lực trong công việc để được thăng chức.
